messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0048",
  "title": "海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量",
  "page_index": 15,
  "page_range": "15"
}

Section text:
## 海外移动游戏市场收入规模&下载量

message.content: This section addresses the overseas mobile game market, specifically targeting questions about market revenue scale and download volume metrics. Based solely on the provided heading, it is intended to cover quantitative performance indicators for international mobile gaming. No specific dates, geographic entities, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, or numerical evidence are present in the excerpt. Retrieval queries should focus on general market size and user acquisition trends, with the understanding that detailed data, timeframes, regional breakdowns, and supporting visualizations would be contained in the full section content.
